      "source": [
        "# Import library yang diperlukan\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "from sklearn.datasets import load_iris #dataset Iris\n",
        "from sklearn.cluster import KMeans\n",
        "\n",
        "# Membuat dataset Iris\n",
        "iris = load_iris()\n",
        "X = iris.data\n",
        "\n",
        "# Menjalankan algoritma K-Means dengan jumlah cluster yang ditentukan\n",
        "Kmeans = KMeans(n_clusters=5) #jumlah cluster\n",
        "kmeans.fit(X)\n",
        "y_kmeans = kmeans.predict(X)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Memvisualisasikan hasil clustering\n",
        "plt.scatter(X[:, 0], X[:, 1], c=y_kmeans, s=50, cmap='viridis')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Menampilkan pusat cluster (centroid)\n",
        "centers = kmeans.cluster_centers_\n",
        "plt.scatter(centers[:, 0], centers[:, 1], c='red', s=200, alpha=0.75)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.xlabel(iris.feature_names[0])\n",
        "plt.ylabel(iris.feature_names[1])\n",
        "plt.title('K-Means Clustering (K=5)')\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ]
    },

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Import library yang diperlukan\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "from sklearn.datasets import load_iris #dataset Iris\n",
        "from sklearn.cluster import KMeans\n",
        "\n",
        "# Membuat dataset Iris\n",
        "iris = load_iris()\n",
        "X = iris.data\n",
        "\n",
        "# Menjalankan algoritma K-Means dengan jumlah cluster yang ditentukan\n",
        "Kmeans = KMeans(n_clusters=7) #jumlah cluster\n",
        "kmeans.fit(X)\n",
        "y_kmeans = kmeans.predict(X)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Memvisualisasikan hasil clustering\n",
        "plt.scatter(X[:, 0], X[:, 1], c=y_kmeans, s=50, cmap='viridis')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Menampilkan pusat cluster (centroid)\n",
        "centers = kmeans.cluster_centers_\n",
        "plt.scatter(centers[:, 0], centers[:, 1], c='red', s=200, alpha=0.75)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.xlabel(iris.feature_names[0])\n",
        "plt.ylabel(iris.feature_names[1])\n",
        "plt.title('K-Means Clustering (K=7)')\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
